lines.speaker: Olivia
lines.text: Would you like to trade in seeds?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get rarer seeds from?

lines.speaker: Olivia
lines.text: The Master Farmers usually carry a few rare seeds around with them, although I don't know if they'd want to part with them for any price to be honest.

sections.title: Catching the player trying to steal from her seed stalls

lines.speaker: Olivia
lines.text: Hey! Get your hands off there!

sections.title: Interacting with her after stealing from her seed stalls recently

lines.speaker: Olivia
lines.text: You're the one who stole something from me!
